title: Clean PVP Mechanics
description: Tweaks, utility and PVP Based Texture Pack, used for Better experience
body:
**# Clean PVP Mechanics 
## Beta V1**

No Explosion particals ( useful for crystal pvp and creeper explosions )
Small totem and shield
Low Fire
Invisibility Catch - catch people in invisibility
Base Finder ( highlights cobbled-deepslate and ender-chests!

Made By SnakeByJake

Minecraft Java IGN: SnakeByJake

Discord IGN: snakebyjake
